name: Santorini
desc: Whitewashed cliffs, volcanic sunsets, and Aegean blue as far as the eye can see.

name: Kyoto
desc: Ancient temples, cherry blossoms, and a timeless world suspended in ritual.

name: Patagonia
desc: Glacier-carved peaks and infinite wilderness at the edge of the world.

name: Amalfi Coast
desc: Lemon groves, pastel villages, and the most dramatic coastline in Europe.

name: Marrakech
desc: Spice-soaked souks, riads, and a city that overwhelms every sense.

name: Maldives
desc: Overwater bungalows, bioluminescent shores, and crystalline infinity.
